title: helenium arbuscula
intro: Helenium arbuscula, also known as Rocky Mountain sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to the high mountain regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium arbuscula include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to lower fever and soothe skin irritations. Helenium arbuscula can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
